name: nestor-plugins
description: NodeNestor plugin collection for Claude Code — memory, context, and productivity tools

plugins.name: rolling-context
plugins.description: Transparent proxy that compresses old messages in the background using Haiku while keeping recent messages fully verbatim. Zero config, zero latency, uses your existing auth.

plugins.name: claude-knowledge-graph
plugins.description: Long-term memory for Claude Code — knowledge graph with entities, relationships, semantic search, auto-extraction from sessions, and context injection via hooks.
